summary: George Hotz puts out a brief call to his blog readers asking if anyone knows of technical coliving spaces. He's looking for a group house with six or more residents who have high technical competence. The post serves as a test to see if anyone actually reads his blog, doubling as a practical request. It's a minimalist post that reveals his interest in community living with technically skilled people.
key_points: First reader request/ask posted to the blog
Seeking a group house with 6+ technically competent residents
Using the post to gauge blog readership
Provides a specific email contact method for responses
money_quotes: I'm looking for a group house with 6+ people where the general level of technical competence is high.
This post is my first ask to this blog, and I guess we'll find out if anybody is reading it.
key_insight: Hotz values surrounding himself with technically skilled people and is interested in communal living arrangements that facilitate this.
